extra.reason: Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed: x-cli group collision (workspace-admin), OpenAPI tag collision (workspace_admin), CONTEXT_ROUTERS drift (mounted separately), redundant CSS wrapper. Filed cd-1h7k (scope ambiguity, blocks cd-ovt4) and cd-wzk0 (docs follow-up).
AsyncIOScheduler bootstrap + register_jobs + heartbeat wired; /readyz flips green end-to-end; 39 scoped tests + 291 broader pass; follow-ups: cd-dcl2 (generator fan-out), cd-8euz (failure alerting).

Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed: wrap_job now awaits async bodies (+ 2 regression tests), tightened idempotency assertion. Filed: cd-76qx (UPSERT race for horizontal worker scale-out), cd-udts (log redaction over-masking event field). All quality gates green.
POST /api/v1/auth/logout implemented: best-effort 204 + clearing Set-Cookie, invalidates session server-side, audit logged. 8 integration tests pass.

Autofix selfreview clean — no BUGS/MISSING/RISKY. All coder-flagged concerns verified against spec (per-user invalidation spec-correct; validate() ordering benign; secure=True mirrors login; CSRF skip correct; docs edits accurate). 70 tests + ruff/mypy green.

Wrapped magic_link.request_link, signup (via magic_link), and membership.invite mailer sends in try/except MailDeliveryError + WARNING log. Audit rows commit before send. 3 new enumeration-guard unit tests mirror recovery pattern. 124 scoped tests pass.

Autofix selfreview clean — no BUGS/MISSING/RISKY. Three guarded sites confirmed as the complete set (recovery-two already guarded, magic/signup/invite the new three). Transactional boundary verified: nonce row flushed before send, audit row written after send (both in-session so they commit with caller's UoW). MailDeliveryError catch scope narrow (Mailer protocol contract wraps all SMTP transport failures). Log shape (stdlib _log.warning + exc_info=True) matches app/util/logging.py JSON formatter + redaction. Recovery precedent fidelity: exact same try/except shape. Invite invariant preserved: email validated upstream before any DB write. Router surface: magic.request 202, signup.start 202, users.invite 201 all preserved on outage. Timing parity for direct /auth/magic/request?purpose=recover_passkey is a pre-existing asymmetry (not introduced here). Filed cd-kw54 (unrelated test_mail_smtp.py format drift). Per instructions, did not commit/push.

Three token kinds (scoped/delegated/personal) landed: migration f7c9e1a4b5d8 adds kind + delegate_for_user_id + subject_user_id + nullable workspace_id + 2 CHECK constraints. mint/verify/revoke branch per-kind. New /api/v1/me/tokens surface for PAT. Scoped: workspace cap 5; PAT: per-subject cap 5. 446 auth tests pass. Follow-ups: cd-t2su (PAT audit seam), cd-xawm (UI), cd-et6y (delegator liveness in verify()).

Autofix selfreview complete. Fixed migration downgrade data-loss bug (DELETE PAT rows before narrowing workspace_id NOT NULL). Added DB-level CHECK constraint tests (7 XOR branches) + 401 coverage for /me/tokens GET/DELETE. Raised cd-t2su (PAT audit), cd-et6y (delegator liveness) to P1 blockers. Filed cd-nld2, cd-a2o3, cd-qj5u. All quality gates green.

Workspace kill-switch wired via spec-canonical workspaces.settings_json column (§02). Migration a1b2c3d4e5f6 adds settings_json. is_self_service_recovery_disabled() walks non-archived grants most-restrictive-wins. Fresh-UoW audit row recovery.disabled_by_workspace. 103 scoped tests pass (SQLite+Postgres). Reconciled §03 step 5 spec drift (any vs every). Follow-up: cd-x1xh (role_grant soft-retire columns).

Autofix selfreview: fixed cd-65kn → cd-x1xh pointer in 4 places, reconciled §03:838 'every' → 'any'. Filed cd-kskl (P3, timing side-channel). Noted §03 step 2 drift for audit-spec pass (pre-existing). 103 scoped tests green on SQLite + Postgres; ruff/mypy/lint-imports clean.

Autofix selfreview: fixed BUG (sweep ignored injected clock → non-deterministic cutoff), switched tuple-ordered job-set assertions to set equality, added pg_only tzinfo-preservation assertion. 63 tests green; ruff/mypy clean.
